title: Claude just dropped UltraCode... its Insane
summary: Jack Roberts explains Claude's UltraCode feature, which enables up to 10 parallel agents managed through code rather than a master LLM. The video covers practical applications including judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out patterns, and dynamic model selection via OpenRouter to optimize for cost and performance.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through Claude's UltraCode feature, which runs up to 10 parallel agents coordinated through code instead of a master LLM. The orchestration shift matters because control logic lives in deterministic code rather than a controlling model, which changes how multi-agent workflows are structured and verified. Concrete patterns covered include judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out, and dynamic model selection through OpenRouter to manage cost and performance.
